languages.text: "Не думаю, что от переговоров будет толк. Слишком поздно".

traits.locale_text: "Не думаю, что от переговоров будет толк. Слишком поздно".

languages.text: "I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."
languages.original_text: "Не думаю, что от переговоров будет толк. Слишком поздно".

traits.locale_text: "I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."
"I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."
"I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."

languages.text: “我认为谈判已毫无意义。一切都太迟了。”
languages.original_text: "I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."

traits.locale_text: “我认为谈判已毫无意义。一切都太迟了。”

languages.text: « Je ne vois aucun intérêt à négocier. Il est bien trop tard pour ça. »
languages.original_text: "I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."

traits.locale_text: « Je ne vois aucun intérêt à négocier. Il est bien trop tard pour ça. »

languages.text: «No tiene sentido negociar. Es demasiado tarde».
languages.original_text: "I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."

traits.locale_text: «No tiene sentido negociar. Es demasiado tarde».

languages.text: "Pazarlık etmenin bir anlamı yok. Bunun için çok geç."
languages.original_text: "I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."

traits.locale_text: "Pazarlık etmenin bir anlamı yok. Bunun için çok geç."

languages.text: "Ich sehe keinen Grund für Verhandlungen. Dafür ist es zu spät."
languages.original_text: "I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sehe keinen Grund für Verhandlungen. Dafür ist es zu spät."

languages.text: 「交渉する意味はない。もう遅い。」
languages.original_text: "I see no point in negotiating. It is too late for that."

traits.locale_text: 「交渉する意味はない。もう遅い。」
